title: Quantum Teleportation: Transmitting Quantum States
description: Master the quantum teleportation protocol - a fundamental quantum communication primitive that transfers quantum states using entanglement and classical communication. Learn the mathematics, circuit implementation, and why this doesn't enable faster-than-light communication.
learningObjectives: Explain the quantum teleportation protocol step by step
Understand why entanglement is necessary for teleportation
Implement the teleportation circuit using quantum gates
Prove that teleportation requires classical communication
Calculate the fidelity of teleported states
Distinguish teleportation from classical information transfer
